app.title: Fediverse Hub
app.subtitle: Unified timelines for Mastodon, Pixelfed, PeerTube, Lemmy and RSS.
login.title: Welcome to Fediverse Hub
login.skipNotice: Skip sign-in to read timelines only. Posting stays disabled until you sign in.
register.created: Accounts were created where the instance allowed it.
register.externalFallback: Some instances require external registration or verification.
register.title: Create Fediverse accounts
register.explanation: Enter a base account name. Fediverse Hub appends .peer and creates accounts on all configured providers.
onboarding.title: Choose your interests
onboarding.subtitle: Pick topics to seed your first federated timeline.
compose.title: Title
compose.readOnlyNotice: Read-only mode: sign in to publish posts.
settings.title: Settings
error.timelineLoad: The timeline could not be loaded.
error.selectInterest: Select at least one interest or enter a valid hashtag.
error.publisherMissing: No publisher is available for this source.
error.postingUnsupported: Posting is not supported by this source.
error.composeEmpty: Add text or media before publishing.
error.mediaTooLarge: One of the selected files is too large.
error.mediaTypeUnsupported: One of the selected media types is unsupported.
error.validationFailed: The post could not be validated.
error.publishFailed: The post could not be published.
error.readOnlyMode: You are browsing read-only. Sign in before publishing.
error.invalidAccountName: Enter a valid account name with letters, numbers, underscores or hyphens.
error.passwordTooShort: Use a password with at least 12 characters.
error.registrationClientMissing: No registration adapter is available for this provider.
